title: Add a colour on a line with the same hour instead of the same period
excerpt: I have initiated my board and would like to know if it is possible to add a colour on a line with the same hour instead of a same period. If for example people scheduled a meeting on a board for the same time the line of…

posts.author: Mariana1 (Mariana Martins)
posts.cookedHtml: I have initiated my board and would like to know if it is possible to add a colour on a line with the same hour instead of a same period. If for example people scheduled a meeting on a board for the same time the line of that common time would be colored.
